articles.description: Japan moves closer to the World Cup knockout stages after defeating Tunisia 4-0 in Group F. It's the most goals Japan has scored in a World Cup match. Ayase Ueda scored twice, with Daichi Kamada and Junya Itō adding to the tally. Japan is now level with the N…
articles.title: Ayase Ueda scores twice in Japan’s 4-0 win against Tunisia in 1,000th men's World Cup match
